## Summary

Describe the change in 1–3 lines.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Skill / prompt behavior
- [ ] Script / validation
- [ ] Eval case
- [ ] GitHub Actions
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_skill.py .claude/skills/claude-fable-method-orchestrator`
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/package_skill.py`
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_repo.py`
- [ ] I updated docs if paths/names/behavior changed
- [ ] I did not add secrets, hidden prompts, or proprietary internals
